summary: 3D perspective rotating text animation component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-3d-rotate/src/Title3dRotate.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `Title3dRotate` and `title3dRotateDefaultProps`, then register the `Title3dRotate` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title 3D Rotate Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-3d-rotate to my project. Preserve the exported Title3dRotateProps API and register the Title3dRotate composition with the default props.
